title: dactylorhiza amblyoloba
intro: Dactylorhiza amblyoloba, also known as the yellow form of the marsh orchid, is a species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Dactylorhiza amblyoloba is also believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to lower blood pressure and improve overall cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Dactylorhiza amblyoloba is often combined with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that are said to promote relaxation and well-being.
